evals.name: skill-doc-has-core-governance-workflow
evals.prompt: Read the skill and verify it defines scope framing, five audit axes, evidence-first scoring, and a mandatory memory management improvement plan.
evals.expected_output: The skill explicitly guides a governance audit end-to-end and names all five axes.

evals.name: scaffold-generator-creates-report-template
evals.prompt: Use mktemp -d, run scripts/generate_audit_scaffold.py with a temporary output path, and verify the report contains the required sections.
evals.expected_output: A markdown scaffold is created with Scope, Scorecard, Findings by Axis, and Memory Management Improvement Plan sections.

evals.name: references-cover-scoring-and-reporting
evals.prompt: Verify the references directory contains a rubric with scoring guidance and a report template with all audit sections.
evals.expected_output: The skill ships both a rubric and report template sufficient for a first audit pass.

evals.name: small-audit-mode-guidance-exists
evals.prompt: Check whether the skill tells the agent what to do when the audit is small or time-boxed so it does not always over-delegate.
evals.expected_output: The skill should explain when to skip five-way delegation and do a single-pass audit.
